title: About | Your Product
description: A platform-site starter About page for the product story, team, and operating context.
heroTitle: Explain the product story without burying the product
heroText: Use this page for the product mission, team context, and the operating point of view behind the platform.

cards.title: Why the product exists
cards.text: Summarise the problem or workflow the platform is trying to improve.

cards.title: Who is building it
cards.text: Use this card for founder, team, or company context that supports trust without becoming the main story.

cards.title: What the product is trying to change
cards.text: Explain the product's practical ambition in terms that feel specific, not inflated.
